g.text: Global deaths in famines that are estimated to have killed at least 100,000 people.

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #666666

g.text: Note: For famines that happened at the end of a decade and the beginning of the next decade, the famine victims are split by decade on a year-by-year basis.

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #666666

g.text: The figure for the 2020s is preliminary and includes data from 2020-2023.

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #666666

g.text: Data sources: Gapminder (2022); Gapminder (2023); HYDE (2023); UN WPP (2024); World Peace Foundation (2025)

text.style: font-size: 9px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #666666

g.text: OurWorldInData.org – Research and data to make progress against the world's largest problems.
